subtopics: Check before pushing — dedup against the user's own AI-Radio library
Play any song from the catalog by title or id
Save a song to the user's library
Read the user's own library counts
Voice tags: queue/new, trending, top, random, friends, following, me, liked, unheard
Voice tags: queue/genre/<slug>, queue/mood/<mood>, queue/artist/@<handle>, queue/similar/<songId>
Reason string must be spoken verbatim
Send a song to a friend
Open the AI-Radio UI in a canvas page ([CANVAS:airadio])

SKILL.md.summary: AI-Radio integration — voice tags to push/pull music, browse the platform-wide catalog, dedup-check the user's own library before pushing, save cross-user songs, manage playlists, manage friends, send songs, vote, queue voice-shaped radio picks, and open the embedded AI-Radio UI as a canvas page on ai-radio.jam-bot.com.
